ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">From the deep seafloor to the battlefield, Lumi Jellie will light a path to victory. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Bioluminescence Quest Pack.</>

<text color="ead268FF">Includes:</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">From the deep seafloor to the battlefield, Lumi Jellie will light a path to victory. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Bioluminescence Quest Pack.</>

<text color="ead268FF">Includes:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: <text color="ead268FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.</>
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: <text color="ead268FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Bioluminescence Quest Bundle:</> Unlock up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Bioluminescence Quest Bundle:</> Unlock up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
